title: A tree-based replacement for PowerPoint
abstract: As a former professor turned industry consultant / frequent presenter in industry, I got sick of Powerpoint: the linear sequence of slides was hard to navigate in live QA sessions, show the whole picture to the audience at once, and divide up for collaboration ... I realized this could all be s
